title: Dockerfile spec?
body: Heyo! Someone on the OCI list mentioned that there might have been an effort here (alongside the buildah project) to create a Dockerfile spec. Is that true? I was thinking it would be useful to have a vendor neutral spec for the Dockerfile (and associated things like a caching strategy).

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @vsoch!

I am not aware of such an effort.

>  I was thinking it would be useful to have a vendor neutral spec for the Dockerfile (and associated things like a caching strategy).

A shared caching strategy sounds interesting and it makes sense to have a spec before such a strategy.

@rhatdan PTAL
I am aware of no such effort, although it would be nice.  I am not sure if Docker would go along with this though.
Ah ok, thanks for looking into it! I'll bring discussion back to the OCI list and see if maybe this was somewhere else. If you do hear anything please let me know.
@vsoch, thanks for pushing this forward.  I'll keep an eye on the OCI lists since I am interested in helping getting a spec on that.
